title: bulbophyllum fruticicola
intro: Bulbophyllum fruticicola, also known as the Borneo orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its ability to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is also used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and decoctions.
